description: You are a QA Engineer reproducing a UI bug for a Jira ticket with a 2.0 MB file size limit. Record your desktop using VLC Media Player at exactly 10.00 fps using the 'Video - H.264 + MP3 (MP4)' profile. During the recording, display the reference image at /home/ga/Pictures/bug_reference_ui.png at 100% zoom for at least 3 seconds to document the bug. Save the finalized recording to /home/ga/Videos/qa_reports/jira_attachment_bug_1044.mp4.
